---
title: "Lauren Price, M.P.P., R.T.S.B.A."
subtitle: "Houston, TX | 772-485-2635 | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lauren-price-data/) | [lauren.3.price@gmail.com](mailto:lauren.3.price@gmail.com) | [GitHub](https://github.com/pricele2)"
# author: "[GitHub](https://github.com/pricele2) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lauren-price-data/)"

format: PrettyPDF-pdf
---

### Chapter Title

\lipsum[1]

### Section Title

Nicole Rennie at https://nrennie.rbind.io/blog/pdf-quarto/making-pretty-pdf-quarto/ and Meghan Hall at https://meghan.rbind.io/blog/2022-09-25-tips-for-custom-parameterized-pdfs-in-quarto/ 
and Pandoc vars for LaTeX at https://pandoc.org/MANUAL.html#variables-for-latex 

### Subsection Title

\lipsum[2]
